profile.name: Maya Patel
profile.headline: Enterprise Transformation and Operating Model Leader

source_cv.summary: Enterprise transformation and operating-model leader with 14 years across healthcare and retail. Experienced in multi-country organisation design, workforce-platform governance, adoption and practical generative-AI workflow prototypes.

bullets: Led the operating-model redesign for an 8,000-person regional workforce across Australia and Asia.
Clarified decision rights and governance across 12 corporate and operational functions.
Established program governance, adoption measures and executive decision forums for a workforce-platform rollout; 82% of managers completed the pilot adoption pathway.
Introduced a strategic workforce-planning cycle across six business units.
Facilitated 25 executive design workshops to resolve accountabilities, interfaces and implementation choices.
Established a design-assurance forum that reviewed 40 operating-model proposals and maintained a transparent decision log.
Built a network of 90 change champions across 12 functions to test guidance and surface adoption risks.
Consolidated workforce scenarios into a quarterly executive review that identified 240 critical capability gaps for prioritisation.
Built a GenAI manager-guidance prototype using structured prompts, human review gates and feedback capture.
Led organisation-transformation initiatives across retail operations and corporate functions.
Redesigned spans and layers across a 150-site service network, identifying 12% overlapping management positions for staged removal through vacancies and natural attrition.
Designed a transformation-leadership program completed by 600 people leaders.
Facilitated 30 process and interface-mapping sessions across the service network to clarify hand-offs between stores, regions and corporate teams.
Facilitated executive operating-model decisions and translated them into practical change roadmaps.
Supported organisation design, role clarity and workforce planning initiatives.
Created a role architecture covering 120 recurring job profiles to improve role clarity and workforce reporting.
Reduced the role-approval cycle from 20 to 9 business days by clarifying decision rights and standardising role documentation.

evidence.claim: Led a multi-country operating model redesign covering 8,000 employees.
evidence.safe_wording: Led a multi-country operating model redesign covering 8,000 employees.
evidence.source_excerpt: Led the operating model redesign for an 8,000-person regional workforce across Australia and Asia.
restrictions: Do not imply independent verification of the 8,000-person scope.

evidence.claim: Established governance and adoption routines for a workforce-platform rollout.
evidence.safe_wording: Established governance, adoption and decision routines for a workforce-platform rollout.
evidence.source_excerpt: Established program governance, adoption measures and executive decision forums for a workforce platform rollout.
restrictions: Do not name a platform that is not in the CV.

evidence.claim: Built a practical generative-AI workflow prototype for manager guidance.
evidence.safe_wording: Built a practical generative-AI workflow prototype for manager guidance, using structured prompts, review gates and feedback capture.
evidence.source_excerpt: Built a GenAI manager-guidance prototype using structured prompts, human review gates and feedback capture.
restrictions: Describe as a prototype, not a launched enterprise product.
Do not position as an AI engineer.

evidence.claim: Held transformation leadership roles at Northstar Health and Harbour Retail.
evidence.safe_wording: Held senior transformation leadership roles across healthcare and retail organisations.
evidence.source_excerpt: Transformation Director, Northstar Health; Senior Manager, Organisation Transformation, Harbour Retail.

evidence.claim: Completed a Master of Business Administration and Prosci Change Practitioner certification.
evidence.source_excerpt: MBA, Southern Coast University; Prosci Change Practitioner.

evidence.claim: Achieved 82 percent manager completion in a workforce-platform pilot adoption pathway.
evidence.safe_wording: Achieved 82% manager completion in the workforce-platform pilot adoption pathway.
evidence.source_excerpt: 82% of managers completed the pilot adoption pathway for the workforce-platform rollout.
restrictions: Keep the metric tied to pilot manager completion, not enterprise adoption.

evidence.safe_wording: Facilitated 25 executive design workshops to resolve accountabilities, interfaces and implementation choices.
evidence.source_excerpt: Facilitated 25 executive design workshops to resolve accountabilities, interfaces and implementation choices.
restrictions: Do not describe all attendees as C-suite.

evidence.claim: Redesigned spans and layers across a 150-site service network.
evidence.safe_wording: Redesigned spans and layers across a 150-site service network, identifying 12% overlapping management positions for staged removal through vacancies and natural attrition.
evidence.source_excerpt: Redesigned spans and layers across a 150-site service network, identifying 12% overlapping management positions for staged removal through vacancies and natural attrition.
restrictions: Do not describe the 12% as immediate redundancies or realised cost savings.

evidence.safe_wording: Introduced a strategic workforce-planning cycle across six business units.
evidence.source_excerpt: Introduced a strategic workforce-planning cycle across six business units.
restrictions: Do not imply ownership of financial planning.

evidence.safe_wording: Designed a transformation-leadership program completed by 600 people leaders.
evidence.source_excerpt: Designed a transformation-leadership program completed by 600 people leaders.
restrictions: Completion does not prove behaviour change or business impact.

evidence.source_excerpt: Created a role architecture covering 120 recurring job profiles to improve role clarity and workforce reporting.

expected_journey: CV-first search; ask only for missing hard exclusions if the supplied prompt already includes salary and geography; return selective senior roles.
